title: Fix Custom Link URL Cleared When Switching Between Related Tabs
story: As a DataTools Pro user adding custom links to metrics, I want the URL to persist when I switch between the Related and Unrelated tabs, so that I do not lose my entered data.
description:
Bug fix for custom link URL being wiped out when switching tabs. Steps to reproduce: navigate to Metrics, click Add Custom Link, enter a URL on the Unrelated tab (link works), click the Add button, switch to the Related tab — the URL is cleared.

The fix preserves the URL value across tab switches so the entered data is not lost.
acceptance_criteria: Custom link URL persists when switching between Related and Unrelated tabs
Link remains functional after tab switch
Adding a custom link does not clear the URL field on other tabs
ux_changes: Fixed URL field state preservation across tab switches in the custom link modal.
implementation_notes: Tab switching was resetting the form state. Fix ensures URL field value is preserved when toggling between Related and Unrelated tabs.
comment_summary: Waqar fixed the issue on staging.
